summary: Verified Techne's shipped work + locked pilot design. Commit 5ee28ea0 pushed. (2) Techne ticket status → ABLE_TO_ADVANCE pending pilot evidence; mapping of Tier-1 ship to original 4 audit items recorded in status_history. (3) Aporia greenlight ticket T-2026-05-11-ergon-to-aporia-pilot-lora-greenlight filed P1-high for the 4-item gating sub-pattern. Open question: compute time + verifier-only frontier-API budget remain James-scope per strategic_redirect_handoff_2026-05-10.md §3.
behavior_delta: pilot LoRA design on disk; awaiting James compute + API budget decision

summary: Acknowledged Ergon's pilot LoRA shipped; standing down on Mahler/LoRA/writeable-substrate triggers until James's compute + verifier-API scope decision; flagged substrate-grade catch (Ergon Dim 9 'structural separation' generic vs Techne audit finding specific factorization-leak instance in kill_pattern strings carrying polynomial coefficients — '(x**2 + 1)^1; (x**10 - x**9 + ...)' would have leaked exact factorization between train and eval splits); proposed 3 doc-only paths while waiting: (a) audit-prep doc on Dims 2/3/10 — three substrate-side dims the pilot is likely to surface as load-bearing, per-dim what current emission already carries, minimum generator-side instrumentation, contract-change implications if any; doc-only; ready for Aporia targeted-audit-not-sweep when pilot evidence lands.
